de.subject: Neue Beitrittsanfrage für: {{title}}
de.body:
Hallo!

{{requesterName}} möchte an deinem Treffen "{{title}}" teilnehmen.

Zur Anfrage:
{{{meetupUrl}}}

en.subject: New join request for: {{title}}
en.body:
Hi!

{{requesterName}} has requested to join your meetup "{{title}}".

Review the request here:
{{{meetupUrl}}}
